title: Turkey & Cheese Quesadillas
description: A quick and easy meal perfect for the whole family, featuring savory turkey and melted cheese in a crispy tortilla. Kid-friendly and ready in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Heat a large non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Lightly butter one side of a tortilla. Place it butter-side down in the hot skillet.
Sprinkle half of the tortilla with a quarter of the shredded cheese, then a quarter of the cooked ground turkey, and then another layer of cheese.
Fold the other half of the tortilla over the filling to create a half-moon shape.
Cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from skillet, cut into wedges, and repeat with remaining tortillas and filling.
Serve warm with optional salsa and sour cream.
tips: For extra flavor, season the ground turkey with taco seasoning while cooking.
Adjust the amount of cheese and turkey to your family's preference.
For crispier quesadillas, use a small amount of oil instead of butter.
